form.formComment: Resumes after a break of seven months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign fifth of 9 at Windsor September 1 over 1200m, soft track; 2.5 len behind Emporess with 60kg at $9. Previously first up; second of 10 at Doncaster May 17 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind Fast Track Harry carrying 59kg at $2.90. Draws okay and should be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of five-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign second of 8 at this track October 27 over 1400m, 0.8 len behind Spirit Of Breeze carrying 59.5kg at $4.30. When resuming last campaign second in a small field at this track April 1 2025 over 1600m, 0.8 len behind Disclosure with 59kg at $2.50. Expect a bold showing.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently 3rd of 12 at this track on March 25 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Phoenix Moon with 60.5kg at $2.20. The run before that 2nd of 10 at this track on March 20 over 1400m, nose behind Royal Jet with 60.5kg at $3. Finds a nice race and appeals as one of the hardest to beat.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign ninth of 12 at Kempton Park All Weather October 22 over 1400m, 17 len behind How Impressive with 61kg at $29. Previously first up; fourth of 12 at this track February 28 2025 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind So Darn Hot with 59.5kg at $15. Plenty more attractive propositions in this race.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 43-day let-up. First-up after five months 4th of 7 at Kempton Park All Weather on March 2 over 1400m, 4 len behind Tadreeb with 58.5kg at $10. Previously second-up ran on from midfield and won by a neck at Wolverhampton March 18 2025 over 1400m defeating Ravenglass carrying 60kg at $3.80. Rates highly and should do much better.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months second last of 16 at Doncaster on March 29 over 1400m, 11 len behind Jimmy Speaking with 52kg at $81. form.formComment: Comes off a 45 day let-up. At the latest run 3rd of 7 at this track on February 28 over 1400m, 5 len behind Profit Street with 57.5kg at $29. Before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 9 at Chelmsford on February 21 over 1400m, 3 len behind Hint Of The Jungle with 61kg at $34. Won't be far away.
